features: Rebuilt Client Reports page into a premium command-center layout
Added KPI cards: Total Reports, Completed, Pending Review, Attention, This Month
Added search, property filter, status filter, date range placeholder, and export button
Added detailed reports table with property photo, report number, property, type, date, status, officer, and actions
Added right rail analytics: report summary donut, recent activity, and top properties
Report rows are generated from existing released patrolReports plus completed requests
